title: onscroll workflow not triggering for chat widget
symptom: The onscroll workflow for the chat widget element does not trigger when the user scrolls up, preventing old data from loading.
not_this_if: Using page on scroll instead of element onscroll
root_cause: The onscroll event may not be properly set up on the chat widget element, leading to the workflow not firing as expected. This can happen if the event listener is not attached correctly or if the element is not in the expected state when the event occurs.
fix_steps: Add an onscroll event listener to the chat widget element in the mounted workflow.
Use the provided code snippet to execute the global workflow with the scroll position.
Ensure the global workflow ID matches the one you intend to use.
agent_instruction: Implement the onscroll event listener in the chat widget's mounted workflow using the provided code snippet.
